title: Tiko and the Shark
writer: Clement Richer, Italo Calvino, Augusto Frassinetti
actors: Al Kauwe, Marlene Among, Dennis Pouira
plot: Story about a young boy who make friends with a baby shark. He introduces the shark to his girl friend and the shark is his pet. A decade later they reunite and now they are husband and wife and the shark becomes friends again
